case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. RANGEL CANCHE KU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-22-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED MAR-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KU, RANGEL CANCHE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KU, RANGEL CANCHE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KU, RANGEL CANCHE $2,360.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,465.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
